note: TODDLER stage. Clinic asks to move the 2-year checkup and requests a reply with availability — pediatric_appointment_request. Hand-derived from taxonomy: a clinic proposing a new time and asking the parent to reply requires the parent to act, so it is a _request, not a one-way _reminder. Reinforces the reschedule->reminder boundary at toddler age.

input.rawContent:
From: frontdesk@littlesprout-pediatrics.ca
Subject: We need to move Mia's 2-year checkup

Dr. Okafor is unexpectedly away on July 9. Could we move Mia's 2-year checkup to July 11 at 3:30 PM, or would another afternoon suit you better? Please reply and let us know what works.
